name: Feta Stuffed Pasta Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta shells in a pot of boiling water as directed on the package until al dente.
2. Rinse the cooked shells until cold water, then drain well.
3. Arrange the shells on a large microwave-safe serving dish.
4. In a bowl, combine feta cheese, red pepper, olives, walnuts, parsley, and oregano.
5. Fill each pasta shell with about 1 tablespoon of the feta cheese mixture.
6. Use a toothpick to skewer each shell securely.
7. Microwave the stuffed shells at medium (50%) power for 4 to 5 minutes or until heated through.
Makes: 48 appetizers
